sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111359" key="filopai/gnios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-παίγνιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111359.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of toys,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:3:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
